🪢

Tangle AI

Let's untangle things together. No answers, no advice — just a friend to think out loud with.

Tangle is not a therapist, doctor, or counselor. It's a thinking companion. If you're in crisis, please call 988 or text HOME to 741741.

🪢

Tangle

online
🪢

Hey there

I'm not here to give you answers. I'm here to get tangled up in ideas with you.

Not a therapist. Not a doctor. Just a thinking buddy.
